text.title: Clean Architecture — Infrastructure Layer
text.summary: SQLAlchemyUserRepository implementing the domain interface, SQLAlchemyUnitOfWork, and ORM model mapping.

example.note: _to_entity and _to_model perform the translation. The domain entity never imports UserModel. UserModel never enters the domain or application layers.

example.code:
class SQLAlchemyUnitOfWork(UnitOfWork): def __init__(self, session: AsyncSession): self._session = session
async def __aenter__(self): return self
async def __aexit__(self, exc_type, exc_val, exc_tb): if exc_type: await self.rollback()
async def commit(self) -> None: await self._session.commit()
async def rollback(self) -> None: await self._session.rollback()
